nodes.label: Preview v2 — Row Layout
nodes.description: DJ bridge 'row' preview v2: two deck rows stacked vertically in a dark panel, with compact deck thumbnails row at top for reference

nodes.label: Top reference strip (compact decks)
nodes.description: Two small compact deck cards at top as comparison/reference (orange waveform + blue waveform)

nodes.label: Header bar — 'ROW · 가로 풀폭'
nodes.description: Section header containing label 'ROW · 가로 풀폭' on dark background

nodes.label: Deck A row (orange)
nodes.description: Full-width Deck A row: left track thumbnail, metadata, full-width orange waveform, right-side timecode + BPM + mini controls

nodes.label: Deck B row (blue)
nodes.description: Full-width Deck B row: left track thumbnail, metadata 'Let It Happen (Soulwax Remix) — Tame Impala', full-width blue waveform, right-side timecode + BPM + mini controls

nodes.label: Deck A artwork thumbnail
nodes.description: Small square album art with 'Let It Be' style caption

nodes.label: Deck B artwork thumbnail
nodes.description: Small square album art thumbnail, left side of Deck B row

nodes.label: Track metadata A — 'Children Of The Night · Daft Punk'
nodes.description: Track title + artist label, top-left of deck A waveform area

nodes.label: Track metadata B — 'Let It Happen (Soulwax Remix) · Tame Impala'
nodes.description: Track title + artist label, top-left of deck B waveform area

nodes.label: Full-width orange waveform A
nodes.description: High-resolution horizontal waveform spanning most of the row width, orange/amber palette (CDJ-style)

nodes.label: Full-width blue waveform B
nodes.description: High-resolution horizontal waveform spanning most of the row width, blue/cyan palette

nodes.label: Deck A timecode 01:24:18
nodes.description: Large monospace timecode display in orange, right side of Deck A row

nodes.label: Deck B timecode 00:48:04
nodes.description: Large monospace timecode display in blue, right side of Deck B row

nodes.label: Deck A BPM 128.00
nodes.description: BPM readout next to timecode A

nodes.label: Deck B BPM 119.00
nodes.description: BPM readout next to timecode B

nodes.label: Deck A VU meter (vertical)
nodes.description: Thin vertical VU level bar between waveform and timecode

nodes.label: Deck B VU meter (vertical)
nodes.description: Thin vertical VU level bar between waveform and timecode

nodes.label: Deck A mini controls cluster
nodes.description: Small knob/jog icons and status chips on far right of Deck A

nodes.label: Deck B mini controls cluster
nodes.description: Small knob/jog icons and status chips on far right of Deck B

nodes.label: Layout pattern — horizontal full-width deck rows
nodes.description: Each deck occupies one full-width row: [artwork | metadata/waveform (flex) | VU | timecode+BPM | controls]. Stacked vertically with small gap.

nodes.label: Dark theme with per-deck accent colors
nodes.description: Near-black panel background, Deck A orange/amber accent, Deck B blue/cyan accent
